case_title: WILLIAMS, BARBARA vs. SF HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL EVICTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-13-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-24-1994

ORDER SUSTAINING DEFT.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND GRANTING PLTF. 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND - DEPT. 6 - QUIDACHAY.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1994, OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER, SEE EXECUTED ORDER.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARBARA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
PROOF OF MAIL SERVICE OF ORDER SUSTAINING DEFT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND GRANTING PLTF 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FILED BY DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION ACTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
